title: barleria grandicalyx
intro: Barleria grandicalyx is a species of flowering plant in the family Acanthaceae, commonly known as the tall firecracker plant due to its vibrant red flowers. The plant is rich in medicinal properties, particularly its leaves, which are traditionally used to treat various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections. The health benefits of Barleria grandicalyx include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to reduce pain and inflammation, and promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, the leaves are often dried and used in teas, infusions, or made into poultices to harness its medicinal properties.
